behavior: Raw text keystrokes go directly to the live PTY input channel
desktop_evidence: src/features/terminal/AgentTerminal.tsx sends xterm onData through send_input_to_agent; src-tauri/src/commands/terminal.rs implements send_input_to_agent; src/features/terminal/AgentTerminal.test.tsx covers direct forwarding
pwa_evidence: src/features/remote/RemoteAgentDetailView.tsx sends terminal input frames on the terminal attach WebSocket; src-tauri/src/remote/gateway.rs handle_terminal_client_message forwards owner input; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx covers stdin enablement
next_action: Keep covered by existing terminal attach tests

behavior: Binary terminal input uses a byte-preserving path
desktop_evidence: AgentTerminal.tsx onBinary invokes send_binary_input_to_agent; src-tauri/src/commands/terminal.rs implements send_binary_input_to_agent; AgentTerminal.test.tsx covers binary input
pwa_evidence: RemoteAgentDetailView.tsx sends data_base64 frames; gateway.rs decodes binary frames; gateway.rs tests reject oversized base64 input
next_action: Keep covered by existing terminal attach tests

behavior: Terminal resize reports fitted geometry to the backend PTY
desktop_evidence: AgentTerminal.tsx reports xterm resize through resize_agent_terminal; AgentTerminal.test.tsx covers bursty and column-only resize reporting
pwa_evidence: RemoteAgentDetailView.tsx sends resize frames; terminal_attach.rs validates owner resize and clamps geometry; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx covers mobile resize messages
next_action: Keep covered by existing mobile resize tests

behavior: Only the active terminal attachment can send input after multiple remote views attach
desktop_evidence: Desktop terminal is local single-owner UI; no remote attachment owner concept
pwa_evidence: terminal_attach.rs promotes most recent attachment and rejects stale owner writes; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx disables stdin when another attachment becomes owner
next_action: Keep as PWA-only network safety behavior

behavior: Initial terminal history can be loaded without draining the desktop renderer
desktop_evidence: AgentTerminal.tsx uses read_agent_pty with peek for initial PTY tail; commands/terminal.rs tests bounded non-draining peek
pwa_evidence: terminal_attach.rs replays initial_output for client scrollback; remote operations keep terminal snapshot non-draining; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx verifies terminal stream rather than polling
next_action: Keep terminal attach as primary PWA path

behavior: Remote terminal snapshot endpoint is no longer the active rendering path
desktop_evidence: remote operations still expose remote_agent_terminal_snapshot for bounded non-draining reads
pwa_evidence: useRemoteStore.refreshActiveAgentTerminal intentionally does not call remoteClient.loadAgentTerminal; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx asserts no snapshot polling when stream is attached
next_action: Leave endpoint as fallback/audit API but do not revive polling renderer

behavior: Codex dark composer background is normalized in light themes
desktop_evidence: AgentTerminal.tsx normalizes Codex composer frames; AgentTerminal.test.tsx covers light-mode fill and theme replay
pwa_evidence: RemoteAgentDetailView.tsx calls normalizeRemoteTerminalOutput and normalizeRemoteTerminalLiveOutput; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx covers snapshot and live Codex composer remapping
next_action: Keep shared terminal capability helpers as the parity mechanism

behavior: Codex color probe replies are not typed into the composer

pwa_evidence: RemoteAgentDetailView.tsx now applies stripTerminalColorReportInputs before sending Codex terminal input frames; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx covers remote color-report filtering
next_action: Keep shared Codex input filter covered on both desktop and PWA paths

behavior: OpenCode terminal capability probes are answered from theme context before render

pwa_evidence: RemoteAgentDetailView.tsx runs planTerminalCapabilityResponses against remoteTerminalCapabilityContext before terminal writes and sends outgoing input frames; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx covers DSR and pixel-size replies

behavior: OpenCode synchronized-output and DECRQM noise is stripped before xterm writes

pwa_evidence: RemoteAgentDetailView.tsx normalizes live update frames through planTerminalCapabilityResponses before xterm writes; RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx covers OpenCode synchronized-output and DECRQM stripping on live updates

behavior: Provider viewport-redraw TUIs repaint in place without synthetic duplicate history

behavior: Codex structured prompt waits for payload echo before submit
